Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This is an incomplete list of pinball games organized alphabetically by name. In 1976, Michael Colmer published his illustrated history of pinball machines that includes an index of machines.[1] There are also separate lists for machines manufactured by Allied Leisure, Data East, Game Plan, Gottlieb, Inder, Jersey Jack, Maresa, Midway Games, Playmatic, Sega, Sega, S.A. SONIC, Spooky Pinball, Stern Pinball, and Zaccaria.

List

[edit]

There are currently 1190 games on this list.

  • 0–9
  • A

Notes

[edit]
  1. ^ a b Same game was released as Grand Prix in International markets and as NASCAR in North America
  2. ^ Based on the soccer themed machine Striker Xtreme
